SourceProxy.name: ComputeVolume
SourceProxy.label: Compute Volume

Documentation.short_help: Compute volume of a space formed by a plane and a pointcloud
Documentation.long_help: Compute volume of a space formed by a plane and a pointcloud

SourceProxy.Documentation: Compute volume of a space formed by a plane and a pointcloud. The input pointcloud is rasterized. The filter has two outputs. One is the rasterized pointcloud. The other is the rasterized pointcloud projected on the XY plane for the visualisation purpose.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Grid resolution
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: The size of a raster bin should correspond to the input pointcloud density If the value is too small with respect to the density of the input pointcloud, the volume will be under-estimated. If the value is too large, the volume will be over-estimated.
